landing.features_subtitle: A comprehensive platform designed to transform how you learn and practice medicine
landing.feat1_desc: Explore anatomical structures in stunning detail with our cutting-edge 3D technology. Rotate, zoom, and dissect virtual models.
landing.feat2_desc: Join forces with medical students worldwide in multiplayer scenarios. Practice teamwork, communication, and decision-making.
landing.feat3_desc: Get instant answers and personalized guidance from MediBot, available 24/7. Our AI adapts to your learning style.
landing.grid_feat1_desc: Explore detailed 3D anatomical models with interactive controls
landing.grid_feat2_desc: Team up with peers in multiplayer medical scenarios
landing.grid_feat3_desc: Get instant answers from MediBot, your 24/7 medical AI
landing.grid_feat4_desc: Personalized learning paths that adapt to your progress
landing.testimonials_subtitle: See what students are saying about MeduCate
landing.benefit1: Master complex anatomy with interactive 3D models
landing.benefit2: Practice emergency scenarios in a safe environment
landing.benefit3: Track your progress with detailed analytics
landing.benefit6: Learn at your own pace with adaptive AI
landing.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of medical students who are already learning smarter, not harder
